aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.intro: Business & Investments is a Kuwaiti platform that connects investors with opportunity holders securely and reliably, with the highest level of privacy and anonymity.

sections.title: Why Us?
sections.body: We are not just an advertising site, but a digital mediator that ensures the quality of offers through rigorous administrative review and data protection for all parties.

sections.title: How it Works?
sections.body: Projects are displayed with preliminary diagnostics. To unlock full details, investors purchase the Project File. Once serious, meetings are coordinated via management.

sections.title: Privacy & Anonymity
sections.body: Members appear with identification numbers (ID) only in early stages. Identity is only revealed when necessary and with the consent of all parties.

sections.title: Commission
sections.body: A success commission of 2.5% applies on the total deal value upon successful completion.
